Get Started

THE COUPON INFRASTRUCTURE FOR AI AGENTS

Mezzofy is the supply layer that AI shopping agents query in real time. When ChatGPT, Gemini, or Kimi recommend a deal, it comes from the Mezzofy Exchange — tokenized, fraud-proof, and ready to redeem. 900M+ weekly AI users. Your merchant inventory. One integration.

Become an AI Supply Partner Explore Integration Protocols

The Next Distribution Channel Isn't an App — It's an AI Agent

Consumers are shifting from searching for deals to asking AI to find them. ChatGPT's Agentic Commerce Protocol and Google's Universal Commerce Protocol are live. The merchants who are already listed in the Mezzofy Exchange are automatically discoverable — those who aren't, are invisible.

Agentic Commerce is Live

ChatGPT launched Instant Checkout (ACP) in September 2025. Google announced Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) in January 2026. AI agents now browse, recommend, and complete purchases autonomously — including coupon redemption.

900M+ Weekly AI Users

ChatGPT alone reaches 900 million weekly users. Google Gemini is integrated across Search, Maps, and Shopping. These aren't future projections — they are live distribution channels operating today.

Structured Data Wins

AI agents can only recommend what they can read. Mezzofy's tokenized coupon inventory is machine-readable, standardized, and fraud-validated — exactly what commerce protocols require. Unstructured promotions are invisible to AI.

Three Protocols, One Supply Layer

Mezzofy exposes your merchant coupon inventory to the world's largest AI platforms through standardized commerce protocols. One listing in the Mezzofy Exchange = discoverable across all three.

LIVE · SEPTEMBER 2025

ChatGPT — Agentic Commerce Protocol

User asks "find me a dining deal near Bukit Bintang" → ChatGPT queries Mezzofy API → returns matching merchant coupon → consumer redeems inside chat via Instant Checkout.

900M Weekly Users

Largest AI user base globally, high purchase intent

4% Transaction Fee Model

Aligns with Mezzofy's performance-based revenue structure

Instant Checkout

Complete redemption within the chat interface, no app switching

Zero Merchant Effort

Merchants listed in the Mezzofy supply pool are automatically discoverable

ANNOUNCED · JANUARY 2026

Google Gemini — Universal Commerce Protocol

Gemini's 45 billion-item Shopping Graph now includes promotions. User sets a condition — "alert me to spa deals under RM50" — Gemini polls the Mezzofy feed and triggers redemption via Google Pay.

45B-Item Shopping Graph

Mezzofy coupons indexed alongside the world's largest product catalog

Cross-Surface Distribution

Coupons surface in Google Search, Maps, Shopping, and Assistant

Backed by Major Partners

Walmart, Target, Shopify, Mastercard, and Visa are UCP launch partners

Conditional Triggers

Consumers set preferences; Gemini automatically matches Mezzofy inventory

OPPORTUNITY · EXPANDING

Kimi & Regional AI Agents — MCP / REST API

Moonshot AI's Kimi dominates Chinese-speaking markets. Integration via Model Context Protocol (MCP) or REST API gives Mezzofy access to mainland China, Hong Kong, and Taiwan user bases. The China Mobile partnership serves as the natural bridge.

China Market Access

Largest coupon consumption market globally

China Mobile Bridge

Existing telco partnership accelerates integration

Multi-Language Support

Mezzofy already supports Traditional and Simplified Chinese

Open Protocol

MCP and REST API enable integration with any emerging AI agent platform

From Merchant Listing to AI Redemption in Four Steps

1

LIST

Merchant lists coupon inventory in the Mezzofy Exchange via the self-serve supply portal. Zero upfront cost.

2

INDEX

Mezzofy tokenizes and standardizes inventory, then exposes it via ACP, UCP, and MCP protocol endpoints. Machine-readable, fraud-proof.

3

DISCOVER

AI agents query Mezzofy supply in real time when users ask for deals. Matched coupons surface inside ChatGPT, Gemini, Kimi, or partner apps.

4

REDEEM

Consumer redeems directly within the AI interface or partner app. Mezzofy validates the token, settles with the merchant, and earns a transaction fee.

Beyond Discovery: The AI-Powered Product Suite

Coupon search is just the starting point. Mezzofy is building a full AI commerce intelligence layer on top of the exchange.

AI Shopping Agent API

Mezzofy becomes a registered data provider for ChatGPT (ACP) and Gemini (UCP). Merchants in the supply pool are automatically discoverable by 900M+ AI users globally. New distribution channel at zero incremental cost.

Predictive Coupon Intelligence

Aggregate anonymized redemption data across thousands of merchants to build predictive models. Which offer types drive highest redemption by location, time, demographic, and season. Sold as a B2B intelligence feed to merchants and demand partners.

Conversational Commerce Concierge

White-label AI chat assistant embedded in demand buyer apps. User types "dinner for two under $50 near Bangsar" — AI surfaces matching Mezzofy coupons, validates and redeems within the bank or telco app. Platform licensing fee on top of transaction fees.

Dynamic Pricing & Smart Quotas

AI engine that automatically adjusts coupon availability based on redemption velocity, merchant capacity, and time-of-day demand. Prevents over-redemption, maximizes merchant ROI, reduces fraud. Premium tier for AI-managed optimization.

AI-Powered Fraud Detection

Machine learning layer on top of tokenized validation. Detects anomalous patterns — velocity abuse, fake account farming, bot redemptions — in real time. Critical for bank-grade integrations. Enables enterprise partners to brand Mezzofy as "enterprise-safe."

AI Merchant Matching Engine

AI automatically routes merchant inventory to the most relevant distribution channel. A Japanese restaurant's lunch deal gets prioritized in the banking app for office workers, not in a mall weekend campaign. Higher redemption rates. Intelligent routing as defensible IP.

The Market Is Moving Now

900M+

ChatGPT weekly active users (source: OpenAI, 2025)

45B

Items in Google's Shopping Graph now including promotions

$57B

Global digital coupon market by 2035, growing at 18% CAGR

4%

ChatGPT Instant Checkout transaction fee — same structure as Mezzofy's model

What AI Commerce Means for You

For Merchants

Your coupons become discoverable to 900M+ AI users the moment you list them in the Mezzofy Exchange. No additional integration. No additional cost. AI distribution is included in every merchant listing.

List Your Inventory →

For Distributors & Partners

Embed a Mezzofy-powered AI concierge into your banking, telco, or HR app. Your users get conversational coupon discovery. You earn platform licensing fees on top of transaction revenue.

Become a Distribution Partner →

For Developers

Integrate Mezzofy's coupon supply via ACP, UCP, or MCP endpoints. RESTful API with OAuth 2.0 authentication, webhook support, and comprehensive SDKs. Build AI-powered coupon experiences on top of our protocol.

Explore API Documentation →

Integration Architecture 

MERCHANT SUPPLY POOL
        ↓
   MEZZOFY EXCHANGE
   (Tokenize · Validate · Standardize)
        ↓
   ┌────────────┬────────────┬────────────┐
   │  ACP       │  UCP       │  MCP/REST  │
   │  Endpoint  │  Endpoint  │  Endpoint  │
   └────────────┴────────────┴────────────┘
        ↓              ↓              ↓
   ChatGPT        Gemini         Kimi / Other
   900M users     Google Search  China Market
        ↓              ↓              ↓
   CONSUMER REDEMPTION → Token Validated → Merchant Settled → Mezzofy Earns Fee

Expose Mezzofy supply inventory via ACP, UCP, and MCP endpoints. AI agents query in real time. Coupon tokens are validated on redemption. Mezzofy earns a transaction fee on every successful AI-referred redemption. One supply listing. Three protocol endpoints. Global AI distribution.

AI Commerce Is Live. Your Inventory Should Be Too.

Merchants already in the Mezzofy Exchange are discoverable by AI agents today. The window to be an early supply partner is now — before your competitors list their inventory first.

Become an AI Supply Partner Talk to Our Team

Tell us about your business and we'll show you how AI agents can distribute your coupon inventory.
